name: Disney
description: Disney movies, characters, villains, and parks

questions.q: In 'The Jungle Book,' which bear teaches Mowgli about 'The Bare Necessities'?

source.notes: Voiced by Phil Harris in the 1967 original. A sloth bear in the book.

questions.q: What is the name of Mickey Mouse's loyal pet dog?

source.notes: First appeared 1930 as 'Rover.' Goofy is also a dog but anthropomorphic.

questions.q: In what year did Mickey Mouse first appear in the short film 'Steamboat Willie'?

source.notes: Released November 18, 1928. One of the first synchronized-sound cartoons.

questions.q: Which 1937 film was Walt Disney's first full-length animated feature?
choices: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

source.original_a: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
source.notes: Budget ~$1.5M. Grossed $8M at release, highest-grossing film of its time.

questions.q: Who is the villainous sea witch in 'The Little Mermaid'?

source.notes: Voiced by Pat Carroll. Design inspired by drag performer Divine.

questions.q: In 'Toy Story,' what is the cowboy doll's name?

source.notes: Full name: Sheriff Woody Pride. Originally conceived as a ventriloquist dummy.

questions.q: What type of animal is Nick Wilde in 'Zootopia'?

source.notes: Red fox, voiced by Jason Bateman. 2016 film won Best Animated Feature Oscar.

questions.q: Pixar's film 'Brave' is set in which country?

source.notes: 2012 film. Merida is the first Pixar princess.

questions.q: Who is the demigod with a magical fishhook in the 2016 film 'Moana'?

source.notes: Voiced by Dwayne Johnson. Based on the Polynesian trickster god.

questions.q: In which 2008 Pixar film does a trash-compacting robot fall in love with a probe named EVE?

source.notes: Waste Allocation Load Lifter: Earth-class. Directed by Andrew Stanton.

questions.q: In the 1998 animated film 'Mulan,' what is the country Mulan disguises herself to serve in?

source.notes: Based on the Chinese legend of Hua Mulan from the Ballad of Mulan.

questions.q: In the first 'Toy Story,' what is the name of the toy-torturing kid next door?

source.notes: Later appears as a garbage man in Toy Story 3.

questions.q: Which song from 'Frozen' won the Academy Award for Best Original Song in 2014?
choices: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
For the First Time in Forever

source.notes: Written by Kristen Anderson-Lopez and Robert Lopez. Performed by Idina Menzel.

questions.q: 'A Whole New World,' a duet sung on a flying carpet, comes from which Disney film?

source.notes: Won Academy Award for Best Original Song (1993). Music by Alan Menken.

questions.q: 'Circle of Life' is the opening song of which Disney film?

source.notes: Composed by Elton John and Tim Rice. Opens with Zulu vocals by Lebo M.

questions.q: Who is the evil fairy who curses Princess Aurora in 'Sleeping Beauty'?

source.notes: Angelina Jolie played her in the 2014 live-action film.

questions.q: Who is the hook-handed pirate villain in 'Peter Pan'?

source.notes: Lost his hand to a crocodile; the croc swallowed a clock and tracks him.

questions.q: In 'Snow White,' which Disney villain repeatedly asks a magic mirror who is 'the fairest of them all'?

source.notes: Also called the Wicked Queen. Alternate name: Queen Grimhilde.

questions.q: Disneyland Paris opened to the public in which year?

source.notes: Opened April 12, 1992. Originally called Euro Disney Resort.

questions.q: Which family is the focus of 'Mary Poppins' (1964)?

source.notes: Mr. George Banks, Mrs. Winifred Banks, Jane and Michael.
